install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install --no-cache-dir transformers accelerate safetensors huggingface_hub sentencepiece protobuf
python -c "from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM; print('transformers OK')"

data_deps.name: wikitext2
data_deps.description: WikiText-2 dataset for calibration and evaluation
